reasoning: The baseline stock price is ~$37.30 from the recent close. For the November 30 date (~1 week out), $37.30 rests near the top of its post-earnings trading range, suggesting a slightly elevated chance of short-term mean-reversion drift downwards (48%). For December 23, the stock may remain pressured by year-end tax-loss harvesting, given its overall weak 2025 performance (>30% down YTD), holding recovery prospects slightly below a coin-flip. Looking further out to February 21, 2026, the company expects to begin realizing portions of $600M in incremental 2026 adjusted EBITDA from strategic restructuring. This, combined with the general market tendency to appreciate and a potential post-January bounce, brings the likelihood of exceeding the 37.30 baseline back slightly above 50% for the longest time horizon.
